description: Case style: Analog watch with a square stainless steel case for enhanced durabilityDial style: Silver dial with silver handsFeatures: Date aperture between the 2 and 4 hour marks, branding between the 9 and 11 hour mark, seconds chronograph face, peripheral data frame with branding, screw to reset timeStrap style: Brown, textured leather strap with press button closureWater resistance: Upto 50 meters, allowing you to wear it out while swimming but not pool side diving, snorkelling or water sportsWarranty: 1 year for analog watches
